prompt_text:
### Demographics: 60-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Reports 1-2 mild hypoglycemia episodes per month (self-resolved); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis)
Heart failure: HFpEF (NYHA Class II)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 5 (0-15) (Dialysis: Not on dialysis); HF: HFpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 3 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~30 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Linagliptin 5mg once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 63.7 kg; Height 183.6 cm; BMI 18.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.2%; 9 months ago 7.5%; 6 months ago 7.3%; 3 months ago 7.8%; current 8.2%), FPG (12 months ago 190mg/dL; 9 months ago 168mg/dL; 6 months ago 183mg/dL; 3 months ago 159mg/dL; current 213mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 60.8kg; 9 months ago 63.1kg; 6 months ago 63.3kg; 3 months ago 65.3kg; current 63.7kg), Height (12 months ago 183.6cm; 9 months ago 183.6cm; 6 months ago 183.6cm; 3 months ago 183.6cm; current 183.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 19.0kg/m²; current 18.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 134mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 80mmHg; 6 months ago 81mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 98U/L; 9 months ago 97U/L; 6 months ago 98U/L; 3 months ago 105U/L; current 102U/L), AST (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 62U/L; current 66U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.9mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 15mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 11mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 12mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 7.7mL/min/1.73m²; current 8mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 397mg/g; 9 months ago 303mg/g; 6 months ago 461mg/g; 3 months ago 368mg/g; current 443mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 72mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 70mg/dL; 3 months ago 75mg/dL; current 71mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 43mg/dL; 9 months ago 46mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 163mg/dL; 9 months ago 178mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 166mg/dL; current 171mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.7g/dL; 9 months ago 12.8g/dL; 6 months ago 12.6g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 12.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.75 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
